Called by the Gnosis Safe after the oracle attests repayment."}},"notice":"Escrow contract for PRISM Protocol cross-chain collateral locking.         Borrowers lock ETH or whitelisted ERC-20 tokens here. The PRISM         Collateral Oracle watches for CollateralLocked events and attests         on Stellar Soroban (attach_collateral \u2192 verify_collateral), which         unblocks disburse_loan.         On repayment: admin calls release() \u2014 collateral returns to borrower.         On default:   admin calls liquidate() \u2014 collateral goes to treasury.         Admin MUST be a Gnosis Safe (2-of-3). ospection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8891738ffe910f0cf2da09566928589bf5d63f4524dd734fd9cedbac3274dd5c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://971f954442df5c2ef5b5ebf1eb245d7105d9fbacc7386ee5c796df1d45b21617","dweb:/ipfs/QmadRjHbkicwqwwh61raUEapaVEtaLMcYbQZWs9gUkgj3u"]},"src/PrismCollateralVault.sol":{"keccak256":"0xaeedfb425bb4b3285e67b1972638aff7d80a603790d587ecc1f274d4a6cdaec2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8de73e0bb29037cd60de09e37765c6cb8391c1fa2b228dd0282db8fe0260ce72","dweb:/ipfs/QmUYacFEFaBi9D48s9V8LNMPRnnnVdGG75GLxjZ4dXKhyY"]}},"version":1}

params._admin: Gnosis Safe 2-of-3 address — only address that can                       release or liquidate collateral.
params._initialTokens: ERC-20 addresses to whitelist at deploy time.                       Pass an empty array to add tokens later via addToken().

params.to: Destination address for the collateral (treasury or auction contract).

params.amount: Amount in the token's native decimals.
params.stellarBorrower: The borrower's Stellar G-address (stored for the oracle).
params.stellarLoanId: Sequential on-chain loan ID from prism-core (0, 1, 2…).

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

liquidate(uint32,address).notice: Send collateral to the PRISM treasury on borrower default.         Requires 2-of-3 Safe signers. `to` should be the PRISM treasury         multisig, not a single EOA.

lock(uint32,address,uint256,string).notice: Lock an ERC-20 token as collateral for a PRISM Stellar loan.

lockETH(uint32,string).notice: Lock native ETH as collateral for a PRISM Stellar loan.

release(uint32).notice: Return collateral to the borrower after full repayment on Stellar.         Called by the Gnosis Safe after the oracle attests repayment.
